summary: World-first self-proposing innovation engine for a constitutionally governed autonomous AI system. SPIE consumes three signal classes — FailureSignal (recurring mutation failure patterns), ConstitutionalGapSignal (invariant category coverage deficits), and MirrorAccuracySignal (self-model fidelity decay) — and synthesises InnovationProposals deterministically. SPIE-GATE-0 prevents duplicate proposals via signal fingerprint deduplication. SPIE-HUMAN0-0 guarantees ratified=True is only reachable via ratify(), never at construction. SPIE-CHAIN-0 provides HMAC-SHA256 chain-linked append-only ledger of every proposal. The system now proposes its own evolutionary direction; HUMAN-0 still ratifies.
ip_claims: Deterministic multi-signal innovation proposal synthesis from failure history, constitutional gap analysis, and Mirror Test accuracy decay in a constitutionally governed autonomous AI system
SPIE-HUMAN0-0: construction-time ratification prevention — ratified flag exclusively settable via governed ratify() pathway, enforced at module level
HMAC-SHA256 chain-linked append-only ledger for cryptographic auditability of self-proposed innovation candidates with signal-fingerprint deduplication gate
world_first_claim: First autonomous AI system to propose its own next innovations from failure history, constitutional gap analysis, and self-model accuracy signals, with HUMAN-0 ratification gate and cryptographic chain-linked proposal audit ledger
extends: INNOV-31 IDE (failure pattern discovery → innovation proposal synthesis)
